RECONSTRUCTIVE SURGERY

READ MORE

 

PRACTICE

Dr Gareth September is a plastic and reconstructive surgeon based in Pinelands, Cape Town.

His special interests include microvascular free tissue transfers with application in the head, neck and breast reconstruction; skin malignancies; upper and lower limb reconstruction; urogenital surgery (for both reconstructive and aesthetic purposes); and cosmetic surgery for face and body. He also offers non-surgical cosmetic treatments, including fillers and Botox procedures.

The practice is located at the Life Vincent Pallotti Hospital in Pinelands, and boasts high quality facilities and innovative technology.

READ MORE

CHOOSING A PLASTIC SURGEON

Choosing any healthcare practitioner is a decision not made on a whimsy. Selecting a plastic and reconstructive surgeoncan be even more difficult. I pride myself on my technical ability and my bedside manner. My patients are looked after both from a surgical perspective and on an emotional level. Trust and respect are the foundation for a solid Doctor-patient relationship- a concept that is the bedrock of our practice.

Read More

COST

I individualise and tailor each operation to the patient. The cost of a procedure will be discussed with the patient after a consultation and thorough examination.

 

PATIENT INFORMATION

All relevant details of a procedure will be discussed with the patient at the time of the consultation. I understand that often there can be "information overload" at the initial consultation. I am always happy to arrange an additional consultation, if required, to provide clarity and to answer questions you may have.

TESTIMONIALS

  • There aren't words to express how grateful I am for your expertise, attention to detail, and perfection in my surgery. I am elated and overjoyed with my new body image! You beautifully erased a decade of shame, embarrassment and discomfort for which I am truly grateful. I want to thank you once more for what feels like a brand new life!” With heartfelt thanks.
    Anonymous
  • There aren't words to express how grateful I am for your expertise, attention to detail, and perfection in my surgery. I am elated and overjoyed with my new body image! You beautifully erased a decade of shame, embarrassment and discomfort for which I am truly grateful. I want to thank you once more for what feels like a brand new life!” With heartfelt thanks.
    Anonymous

SCHEDULE YOUR CONSULTATION

.

DR GARETH SEPTEMBER

Sessional consultant at Tygerberg hospital from 2016 – taking charge of all major Head & neck reconstructions in close collaboration with ENT department. Prof Frank Graewe full time assistant for his breast reconstruction patients 2016 – 2017. I still assist Prof Graewe with his DIEP flaps for breast reconstruction on an ad hoc basis. Assisted at Renaissance clinic. Assistant to Dr Ottie van Zyl 2015 -2016 with microvascular free tissue transfers (free flaps) for Head and Neck + lower limb reconstructions.
